_comment: Static mirror of SEO-relevant fields from src/content-registry/data.ts. This file feeds scripts/prerender.mjs (a Node ESM script that cannot import the TS registry directly without a transpile dependency). When data.ts changes, update this snapshot in the same commit. The registry remains the single source of truth at runtime; this snapshot is build-time-only and only carries the subset surfaced to crawlers / link previews per R10.11.
